title: Gmail trigger stuck on 'Executing Workflow'
symptom: The workflow keeps displaying 'Executing Workflow' indefinitely, but finishes execution when stopped.
root_cause: This issue may arise due to a temporary glitch in the n8n interface or a browser-related issue that prevents the UI from updating correctly after execution.
fix_steps: Check if the issue persists after refreshing
agent_instruction: Refresh the browser page after saving the workflow to resolve the issue.
safety_notes: Ensure to save your workflow before refreshing to avoid losing changes.
